papers.title_en: DDIAgents: Mechanism-Conditioned Context Flow for Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction
papers.authors: Zhenqian Shen, Yu Liu, Xiaoyi Fu, Quanming Yao
papers.evidence: 使用机制条件上下文流的多智能体框架进行药物相互作用预测
papers.tldr: 药物相互作用预测需推理异质性证据，且相关性随机制变化。提出DDIAgents机制条件多智能体框架：规划智能体动态实例化专家并路由知识源，结论智能体聚合分析。在基准上优于特征、图、LLM和代理方法。展示了多智能体系统组织异质知识进行自适应可解释推理的潜力。
papers.abstract_en: Drug-drug interaction (DDI) prediction is essential for medication safety, yet it requires reasoning over heterogeneous biomedical evidence whose relevance changes across interaction mechanisms. We propose DDIAgents, a mechanism-conditioned multi-agent framework that performs DDI prediction through dynamic knowledge orchestration. Given a drug pair, a planner agent instantiates specialized expert agents, routes mechanism-relevant knowledge sources to each agent, and aggregates their analyses through a conclusion agent. By adapting context flow to the inferred interaction mechanism, DDIAgents reduces irrelevant information, supports complementary expert reasoning, and produces interpretable agent-level rationales. Extensive experiments on realistic DDI prediction benchmarks show that DDIAgents consistently outperforms existing feature-based, graph-based, LLM-based, and agent-based baselines. Beyond prediction performance, DDIAgents demonstrates how multi-agent systems can organize heterogeneous scientific knowledge for adaptive and interpretable AI4Science reasoning.

papers.title_en: Beyond Triplet Plausibility: Relation Set Completion in Knowledge Graphs
papers.authors: Zihao Zheng, Borui Cai, Yao Zhao, Keshav Sood, Yong Xiang
papers.evidence: 知识图谱补全方法可用于药物发现
papers.tldr: 知识图谱以三元组形式组织现实知识，广泛应用于下游任务。由于天然的不完整性，知识图谱补全被广泛研究，但现有方法仅关注三元组级别的缺失，忽略了实体与关系兼容性信息的缺失。针对这一局限，本文提出关系集补全任务(RSC)，旨在推理与给定实体语义兼容的缺失关系，并提出关系集嵌入模型(RelSetE)建模实体上已有关系的潜在模式。在三个基准数据集上，RelSetE有效捕捉了实体-关系兼容性模式，在推断缺失关系上表现优异。该工作为知识图谱补全提供了新视角，补充了链接预测的不足。
papers.abstract_en: Knowledge graphs (KGs) organize real-world knowledge as triplets and underpin many downstream applications. Due to their inherent incompleteness, knowledge graph completion (KGC) is widely studied and is typically formulated as triplet prediction, with link prediction as the dominant paradigm. However, this formulation focuses on the incompleteness of triplet-wise information and overlooks the incompleteness of entity-relation compatibility information. To address this limitation, we introduce a relation set completion task (RSC), which complements the link prediction task and aims to reason about missing relations that are semantically compatible with a given entity. We further propose a Relation Set Embedding model (RelSetE), which models latent patterns among the observed relations of entities to infer missing ones. To evaluate RelSetE, we derive three benchmark datasets from standard KG benchmarks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RelSetE effectively captures entity-relation compatibility patterns and performs favorably in inferring missing relations of entities. Code and data are publicly available.

papers.title_en: Beyond Triplet Plausibility: Relation Set Completion in Knowledge Graphs
papers.authors: Zihao Zheng, Borui Cai, Yao Zhao, Keshav Sood, Yong Xiang
papers.evidence: 提出知识图谱关系集补全，直接可应用于药物发现中的知识图谱补全
papers.tldr: 传统知识图谱补全聚焦于三元组预测，忽略了实体与关系之间的兼容性信息。本文提出关系集补全任务，旨在补全与实体语义兼容的缺失关系，并设计RelSetE模型通过嵌入实体关系集来学习潜在模式。在三个衍生基准上的实验表明，RelSetE能有效推断缺失关系，显著提升知识图谱的完整性。该工作补充了链接预测范式，为知识图谱补全提供了新视角。
papers.abstract_en: Knowledge graphs (KGs) organize real-world knowledge as triplets and underpin many downstream applications. Due to their inherent incompleteness, knowledge graph completion (KGC) is widely studied and is typically formulated as triplet prediction, with link prediction as the dominant paradigm. However, this formulation focuses on the incompleteness of triplet-wise information and overlooks the incompleteness of entity-relation compatibility information. To address this limitation, we introduce a relation set completion task (RSC), which complements the link prediction task and aims to reason about missing relations that are semantically compatible with a given entity. We further propose a Relation Set Embedding model (RelSetE), which models latent patterns among the observed relations of entities to infer missing ones. To evaluate RelSetE, we derive three benchmark datasets from standard KG benchmarks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RelSetE effectively captures entity-relation compatibility patterns and performs favorably in inferring missing relations of entities. Code and data are publicly available.

papers.title_en: PromptGNN-sim: Deep Fusion and Alignment of GNN and LLMs for Text-Attributed Graph Learning
papers.evidence: GNN与LLM的深度融合用于文本属性图学习，可应用于药物相互作用预测
papers.tldr: 文本属性图学习现有方法将文本与结构分离处理，导致模态间交互不足，在稀疏连接或跨图泛化时性能下降。为此提出PromptGNN-sim框架，利用GAT结合结构注意力与文本相似性进行语义感知邻域选择，生成结构感知提示给LLM，并通过双向跨模态对比学习和交叉注意力联合优化GNN与LLM。在六个数据集上，该方法在准确率、泛化性和鲁棒性上超越经典GNN、LLM及近期融合方法，验证了交互式结构语义协作的有效性。
papers.abstract_en: Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) combine textual semantics with graph structure and are central to many graph learning tasks. However, existing fusion methods often treat text and structure as separate inputs in a shallow, one-way pipeline, which limits deep interaction between modalities and weakens performance under sparse connectivity or cross-graph generalisation. To address this issue, we propose PromptGNN-sim, a bi-directional structure-semantic fusion framework for collaborative GNN-LLM learning. PromptGNN-sim uses a Graph Attention Network (GAT) for semantically aware neighborhood selection by combining structural attention with textual similarity. The selected structural context is then used to generate structure-aware prompts for an LLM, including the target node summary, label categories, and representative keywords from similar neighbors. During training, bi-directional cross-modal contrastive learning and cross-attention are introduced to jointly optimize the GNN and LLM components. Experiments on six public datasets, including Cora, Pubmed, and WikiCS, evaluate accuracy, generalisation, and robustness under cross-task transfer, cross-dataset generalisation, and sparse perturbations. Results show that PromptGNN-sim outperforms classical GNNs, LLMs, and recent GNN-LLM fusion methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of interactive structure-semantic collaboration for text-attributed graph learning.
